title: Further Education and Skills: July 2025
body: "These further education and skills statistics for England cover the 2024 to 2025 academic year reported to date, August 2024 to April 2025.   They include government-funded further education for adults, aged 19 and over. This covers:   adult further education and skills summary statistics education and training summary statistics essential skills tailored learning and non-regulated provision learner participation and achievements   This excludes schools and higher education.  Headline further education figures include apprenticeships where appropriate.  A separate Apprenticeships: July 2025 statistics publication provides more information on apprenticeships. "
